belier.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazes at 22 degrees Cancer today, creating a sharp square to your Aries nature - a productive tension between your instinct to charge forward and a quiet pull toward what truly nourishes you. With no planets in retrograde, the cosmic road is clear and unobstructed, but the Sun settling into early Taurus reminds you that speed is not always your greatest ally. Mars, your ruling fire, burns brightest when it knows what it is fighting for.
belier.love: The Cancer Moon stirs deep waters beneath your usual bold surface - someone close may need more tenderness than passion from you today, and offering it costs you nothing. If you are single, a moment of genuine vulnerability could open a door that bravado never could. Let the fortress walls lower, just slightly.
belier.work: The Taurus Sun anchors your restless Aries drive into something remarkably productive - this is a rare day when you can both initiate and follow through. Plant seeds in a project that requires patience as much as courage. The absence of any retrograde means your communications land cleanly, so send that proposal, make that call.
belier.energy: Your physical vitality runs high but carries an emotional undertone courtesy of the Cancer Moon - your body may signal a need for rest before your mind is willing to admit it. Honor that signal rather than push through it; even the flame needs fuel.
belier.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that what is within mirrors what is without - today your gut feelings about people are unusually precise, almost uncomfortably so. Trust the quiet knowing that surfaces when you stop moving long enough to hear it.
belier.mantra: I move with purpose, and I rest with wisdom.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun walks through your own territory today, sitting at 3 degrees of Taurus, and that alone is a quiet form of power. The First Quarter Moon in Cancer at 22 degrees forms a supportive water-to-earth bridge, softening your natural groundedness with emotional warmth. With no planets retrograde, the current flows forward cleanly - this is a day that rewards presence over analysis.
taureau.love: The Cancer Moon stirs something tender beneath your usually composed surface, and those closest to you may sense a new openness in you. Let them in. Venus, your ruling planet, governs what you draw toward yourself - today, authenticity is more magnetic than any performance of strength.
taureau.work: The Sun in Taurus sharpens your focus and your patience, two gifts that solve problems others abandon. A project requiring careful, methodical attention is exactly where your energy belongs right now. Heraclitus reminded us that 'all things are in flux' - yet you are the one who builds something lasting within that flux.
taureau.energy: Your vitality has a slow, reliable burn to it today, like embers that sustain heat long after the flame is gone. Honor your body's pace rather than forcing a sprint - a walk in nature or a nourishing meal will do more for you than any push through fatigue.
taureau.intuition: The Cancer Moon speaks in feelings before words, and your earthy nature sometimes dismisses that language too quickly. Today, notice what your body knows before your mind catches up - that subtle tension or unexpected ease is data worth reading.
taureau.mantra: I am rooted, open, and enough.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The first quarter Moon at 22 degrees Cancer pulls at something tender beneath your usual quicksilver surface today. Cancer and Gemini share a restless curiosity, but where you chase ideas, Cancer chases feeling - and right now the Moon is asking you to let those feelings catch up with your thoughts. With no planets retrograde and the Sun freshly rooted in Taurus, there is a rare stillness around you, a fertile pause inviting your mercurial mind to slow down and take root.
gemeaux.love: Words come easily to you, but today the truest connection happens in the spaces between sentences - a held glance, a hand resting on a shoulder. If you are in a relationship, resist the urge to fill every silence with wit; let the Cancer Moon draw out what is real and unguarded in you. For those unattached, someone who makes you feel genuinely safe may catch your attention more than someone who simply makes you laugh.
gemeaux.work: The Taurus Sun anchors your typically scattered mental energy, giving you unusual focus and follow-through today. This is a good moment to return to a project you started but abandoned - your mind is steady enough now to finish what it began. Mercury, your ruling planet, moves freely with no retrograde friction, so communications, negotiations, and written work carry real weight and clarity.
gemeaux.energy: Your physical vitality today has a quiet, grounded quality - less the crackling electricity of your usual self, more a warm, sustained flame. Honor that by choosing steady nourishment over stimulation: a walk, a proper meal, an early evening rather than a late one.
gemeaux.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the inner and outer worlds mirror each other perfectly - today, pay attention to what your body feels before your mind explains it away. A hunch arriving as a tightness in the chest or a sudden warmth in the gut is worth more than a clever argument right now.
gemeaux.mantra: I let my heart speak before my mind edits it.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon, your ruling planet, sits in your own sign today at 22 degrees - a rare homecoming that amplifies everything you feel, sense, and carry. At the First Quarter phase, she is neither hiding nor fully revealed, much like you when you stand at a threshold between instinct and decision. The Sun in early Taurus anchors this flood of feeling in something solid and real, giving your tidal nature a shoreline to rest upon.
cancer.love: With the Moon in Cancer, your capacity for tenderness is running at full tide today - those you love will feel it even before you speak. If there is something unspoken between you and a partner or a close friend, this is a day when the silence itself becomes eloquent. Single or partnered, let yourself be a little more visible than comfortable; the vulnerability is the gift.
cancer.work: The Taurus Sun steadies your often-wavering focus and asks you to build something lasting rather than simply reactive. This is a good day for projects that require sustained attention, patience, and care - not the sprint, but the long, deliberate craft. Trust that the emotional intelligence you bring to your work is a genuine skill, not a distraction from it.
cancer.energy: Your physical energy today is closely tied to your emotional state, more than usual - if you feel seen and safe, you will feel capable and strong. Honor that connection rather than fight it; a short walk near water or a moment of stillness can reset your entire body.
cancer.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the inner world mirrors the outer - and today your inner world is speaking loudly and clearly. Pay attention to the images that arise between sleep and waking, or the quiet impressions you receive before your rational mind has a chance to edit them.
cancer.mantra: I trust the tide that moves through me.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The First Quarter Moon blazing at 22 degrees Cancer pulls at your emotional core today, Leo, creating a productive tension between what you feel privately and what you project outward. With no planets in retrograde, the sky is a clean stage, and the Sun settled in early Taurus grounds your solar fire into something tangible and enduring. This is a day where wanting is not enough - you are asked to build.
lion.love: The Cancer Moon stirs a tenderness in you that your pride sometimes keeps under lock, and today that softness is actually your greatest power. Let someone see the version of you that needs warmth rather than applause - that vulnerability will draw people closer than any performance could. If you are already in a bond that feels solid, deepen it with an honest word rather than a grand gesture.
lion.work: The Taurus Sun rewards patience and craft right now, which means your instinct to rush toward recognition should be kept on a short leash today. Lay a foundation brick by brick - the work you do quietly this week will be visible to everyone by month's end. Collaborate with someone who balances your enthusiasm with practicality; together you cover more ground than either could alone.
lion.energy: Your fire burns steadily rather than in dramatic flares today, which is actually the more useful flame. Honor that by pacing yourself - one sustained effort is worth more than three brilliant sprints followed by exhaustion.
lion.intuition: The Cancer Moon opens a channel between your heart and your gut, and something you feel about a situation - even if you cannot yet articulate it - is worth heeding. As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'As within, so without': what stirs quietly inside you now is already shaping what will appear outside you soon.
lion.mantra: I build with warmth what fire alone cannot hold.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The First Quarter Moon swells to nearly half its fullness in Cancer, pulling tides across your chart's most sensitive angles. As an earth sign, you feel this watery lunar pressure not as flood but as fertile irrigation - something soft and persistent moving beneath your practical surface. With no planets in retrograde, the current flows cleanly forward, and Taurus's solar anchor grounds you without slowing your Mercurial mind.
vierge.love: Cancer's Moon opens a tender portal today, softening the edges you sometimes keep sharp for self-protection. Someone close may need more than your capable hands - they need the quiet warmth you sometimes hesitate to show, fearing it is not enough. Let it be enough. It is.
vierge.work: The Taurus Sun steadies your notoriously restless analysis, giving your attention a quality of patient depth rather than scattered precision. This is a day for finishing what is half-done rather than opening new inquiries - the First Quarter demands decisions, not deliberation. Trust the method you have already built.
vierge.energy: Your body is asking for nourishment today, not performance - a slower meal, a walk without destination, water drunk with intention. The lunar pull in Cancer may surface an old tiredness that has been waiting politely in the background; honor it before it speaks louder.
vierge.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that what is below mirrors what is above, and today your gut feelings are unusually faithful mirrors of invisible truths. When a small inner voice whispers something your logic has not yet assembled, write it down before your analytical mind argues it away.
vierge.mantra: I trust the quiet knowing that lives in my hands.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The first quarter Moon at 22 degrees Cancer pulls a quiet tide through your emotional foundations today, creating a gentle friction with the Sun settling into early Taurus. For you, Libra, whose scales are ruled by Venus - now moving freely without retrograde shadow - this tension between feeling and form asks you to decide something you have been softening with perhaps too much grace. No planet retreats today, which means the sky itself is leaning forward.
balance.love: Cancer's lunar warmth stirs the part of you that longs for genuine closeness rather than beautiful surface. If there is someone beside you, resist the temptation to keep things harmonious at the cost of honesty - a single true word today is worth a season of careful diplomacy. If you are searching, notice who makes you feel at home rather than merely admired.
balance.work: Taurus's solar steadiness grounds your natural tendency to weigh every option endlessly - today, choose one direction and commit to it with full weight. A project that has been hovering in deliberation is ready to be signed, submitted, or simply begun. Venus gives your aesthetic judgment unusual clarity, making this an excellent moment for anything involving design, negotiation, or presentation.
balance.energy: The first quarter phase is inherently activating - your body may feel the push to move, to build, to complete what was started. Honor that impulse rather than rationalizing it away; even a brisk walk carries the day's momentum into your cells.
balance.intuition: As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'As within, so without' - the mild discomfort you feel at the edges of a decision is not anxiety, it is your inner compass calibrating. Sit briefly in stillness before responding to anything important, and the answer will surface with surprising clarity.
balance.mantra: I choose with clarity and trust my own heart.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The First Quarter Moon at 22 degrees Cancer pulls a powerful tide through your emotional depths today, Scorpio. Water calls to water: the Moon in her most nurturing sign forms an invisible current with your own Plutonian nature, stirring what has long been settled at the bottom. With no planets in retrograde, the path is unusually clear, and what surfaces now is meant to be seen.
scorpion.love: An unspoken truth between you and someone close has been circling like a fish beneath ice. Today the ice thins. You don't need to force the conversation, simply stop preventing it. Vulnerability, which you guard like a secret vault, is the precise key that opens the other person's door.
scorpion.work: The Sun freshly planted in Taurus gives your ambitions a slow, deliberate root system today. Resist the urge to push for dramatic transformation at work. The most powerful move you can make right now is patient, methodical follow-through on something you've already started.
scorpion.energy: Your vitality runs deep rather than high today, like a river that is narrow but swift. Don't mistake stillness at the surface for weakness beneath it, you have more in reserve than you realize.
scorpion.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'What is above is like what is below.' The Cancer Moon is mirroring your inner ocean back at you with unusual clarity. Trust the images and impressions that arise before logic has a chance to edit them.
scorpion.mantra: I trust what surfaces from my own depths.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The First Quarter Moon at 22° Cancer pulls at something tender beneath your usual fire, Sagittarius. Where you habitually aim your arrow outward toward horizons and ideals, this lunation asks you to pause and feel the weight of what you carry at home, in the chest, in the unspoken. With no planets in retrograde, the path ahead is genuinely clear - but clarity without depth is just speed, and today invites depth.
sagittaire.love: Cancer's lunar light softens your natural restlessness into something your partner or a potential connection can actually hold onto. If you have been keeping things light and noncommittal out of habit, today you may find that showing a sliver of vulnerability opens a door you forgot was there. Let yourself be arrived at, not just departed from.
sagittaire.work: The Taurus Sun at 3° grounds your expansive Jupiterian vision in something practical and buildable right now. This is an excellent day to take one large dream and sketch its bones - budgets, timelines, the unglamorous scaffolding. Sagittarius often conceives; today you can also construct.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire burns steadily rather than in bursts today, which is actually a gift. Channel that even heat into sustained effort rather than chasing the next spark of excitement.
sagittaire.intuition: As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'As above, so below' - the emotional tide stirred by the Cancer Moon is not noise but signal. Pay attention to what feels like home and what merely feels familiar; they are not the same thing.
sagittaire.mantra: I am deep enough to hold what I love.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The first quarter Moon at 22 degrees Cancer pulls directly across your axis today, Capricorn, creating a quiet but insistent tension between your public ambitions and your private roots. With no planets in retrograde, the sky asks nothing of you but forward motion - yet the Cancer Moon whispers that forward and inward are sometimes the same direction. The Sun newly settled in Taurus forms an earth trine with your own nature, grounding whatever you touch today in something that can last.
capricorne.love: That lunar opposition to your sign stirs the deep well of feeling you usually keep sealed behind good manners and pragmatism. Someone close may need more of you than your schedule allows - consider whether your calendar is protecting your heart or simply hiding it. The Taurus Sun rewards patience in love; what you tend carefully now will not wither.
capricorne.work: Today favors the work that asks for your hands as much as your mind - building, revising, finishing what was started rather than launching the new. Saturn's steady hand is unimpeded by any retrograde fog, so decisions made today carry real weight; sign what deserves your signature, leave the rest on the table. Heraclitus said you cannot step into the same river twice, but today the river is calm enough to cross without drama.
capricorne.energy: Your body is an earth instrument and the Taurus Sun plays it well today - stamina is solid, recovery is faster than usual. Resist the urge to spend that reserve all at once; Capricorn's great flaw is mistaking endurance for invincibility.
capricorne.intuition: The Cancer Moon opens a small door in the floor of your rational mind, and strange, useful things float up through it - pay attention to what surfaces between meetings, in the shower, at the threshold of sleep. As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, the inner and the outer mirror each other; trust what your gut shows you before your logic has time to argue.
capricorne.mantra: I build with care what time will prove worthy.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The First Quarter Moon at 22 degrees Cancer pulls a tide through you today, Aquarius - and you, a creature of open air, feel the tug of something ancient and domestic you rarely acknowledge. This is not your natural territory, yet Heraclitus was right: the river you cannot step into twice is precisely the one worth studying. With no planets in retrograde and the Sun freshly rooted in Taurus, the sky is unusually still, a rare invitation to plant something instead of simply theorizing about seeds.
verseau.love: That lunar pressure in Cancer stirs feelings you ordinarily file under 'data points' - don't let your mind audit what your chest is quietly saying today. If you share your life with someone, a small, unhurried gesture - a meal, a hand held a beat longer than usual - carries more voltage than any grand declaration. If you are unattached, notice who makes you feel grounded rather than merely stimulated.
verseau.work: The Taurus Sun lends a slow, deliberate gravity to your normally electric mental pace, and this friction is useful. The brilliant idea you have been circling for weeks asks to be made tangible today - sketched, drafted, spoken aloud. Uranus, your ruling planet, rewards those who dare to materialize the vision, not just admire it from altitude.
verseau.energy: Your body is borrowing from emotional reserves today, so treat it like a guest rather than a machine. Rest is not retreat - it is the breath between the notes that makes the music coherent.
verseau.intuition: Cancer's lunar light illuminates the invisible threads between people, the loyalties and longings that run beneath logic. Trust the quiet knowing that surfaces when you stop explaining yourself to yourself.
verseau.mantra: I let what is felt be as real as what is known.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The first quarter Moon at 22 degrees Cancer floods the sky with tidal emotion, and for you, Pisces, water speaks to water. Your ruling Neptune resonates with this lunar tide like a bell struck deep underwater, amplifying every feeling that surfaces today. With no planets retrograde and the Sun settling quietly into early Taurus, there is a rare solidity beneath your usual fluidity - use it as an anchor, not a cage.
poissons.love: The Cancer Moon opens a chamber in your heart you may have kept half-closed, and something tender and unspoken wants air today. If you are with someone, a moment of wordless presence - a hand held longer than necessary, a shared silence - carries more meaning than any rehearsed declaration. If you are searching, notice who makes you feel safe enough to be honestly strange.
poissons.work: The Taurus Sun grounds your famously wandering attention in something useful and earthly, making this an excellent day to build rather than dream. Bring one of your floating visions down into a concrete form - a first draft, a budget sketch, a single phone call you have been deferring. The mystical and the practical are not enemies today; they are collaborators.
poissons.energy: Your vitality flows in currents rather than straight lines, so honor that rhythm and rest when the tide pulls back. Gentle water, a slow walk near any natural element, or simply an unhurried meal will restore more than forced productivity ever could.
poissons.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that what is within is like what is without - today your inner weather and outer events are unusually synchronized, so pay close attention to small signs. A dream fragment, an overheard phrase, a sudden image rising without reason - these are not noise; they are dispatches from a deeper order.
poissons.mantra: I am rooted in calm and open to wonder.
poissons.author: Sibylle
